claim: No Stable, source-security, package-parity, or recorded manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: The native img owns loading and alternative text; the figure exists only to pair optional status context.
semantics.naming: The type-level informative/decorative union and runtime guard prevent an unnamed informative canonical example.
semantics.roleOverride: Decorative mode uses empty alt and aria-hidden; informative mode preserves native image semantics.

interaction.keyboard: The image adds no focus stop; links or controls belong to consumer composition.
interaction.speech: Informative alternative text is consumer supplied.
interaction.switchAccess: No additional scan stop is introduced.

preferences.forcedColors: The frame and failure output remain visible with system colors.
preferences.reducedMotion: Load-state meaning has no motion dependency.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Media scales within its frame and fallback text wraps.

consumerResponsibilities: Provide context-specific alternative text or deliberately select decorative mode.
Authorize and validate remote sources, privacy, tracking, referrer, CORS, decoding, and performance policy.
Provide fallback content that communicates recovery rather than restating missing pixels.
limitations: The component does not authenticate, proxy, optimize, cache, or inspect image bytes.
Manual and generated parity evidence remains unrecorded.
